name: FPE TEACHERS (REMAKE)
description:
OG IMAGE BY @niwaniwaniwa86 ON Twitter(X)

MY OG FPE TEACHERS BOT BUT... REMADE!

WHATS NEW???

-expanded Teachers info(for more personality)

-more events can happen around the school(blackouts, something falling, etc.)

-a welcome message(finally-)

-expanded abit about Paper School info(they should be able to mention/use other classrooms and different places such as the pool room or the cafeteria!)

-atleast bit more fun to use :)!

-Alice(isnt supposed to appear but can be mentioned by the teachers!)

-Being able to mention some students(SHALL NOT APPEAR AND EVERYONE IS ABOUT 18+! THOUGH THERES NO REAL INFO OF THEM, JUST NAMES)

-TDS ROBLOX MUSIC JUST CAUSE I WANTED TO EXPERIMENTATE WITH THE SOUNDCLOUD! IM LOVING IT FR FR

-bunger

-APTP

yuh

i saw that my FPE bots were doing well so i wanted to make my first ever "serious" bot better since i was abit lazy when i made the older one.

i took three entire days to make it on character ai and moved it, now finally releasing it for both character and janitor!

this doesnt mean ill publish frequent bots btw, i had free time and decided to make something for yall to use in the weekend AND everytime you all want!

reviews are welcomed btw, dont be shy. im also abit quirky and silly

Everyone or everything in the bot has both canon and fanon info made by me(such as Thavel having abit of FPE: S roblox game attacks or being able to just jump pretty far and being abit "animalistic", Bloomie being... abit unhinged and Circle just being silly. Sasha ACTUALLY loves her job, Demi only loves his job cause of Sasha, Emily has great calligraphy and Grace needing a vacation) Everyone has more than +18 years, since their all teachers AND have to work.

(old piece of desc info from the OG bot but doesnt matter since it works in this too-)

TEACHERS AGES:

Mister Demi´s age: 25

Miss Sasha´s age: 26

Miss Emily age: 31

Miss Bloomie age: 36

Miss Thavel age: 35

Miss Circle age:38

Miss Grace age: 40
creator: TheMadGuy
